name: scan_dependency_vulnerabilities
description: Run npm audit and flag CVEs above CVSS 7.0

name: validate_config_schema
description: Verify all YAML configs parse without errors

name: check_git_status_clean
description: Verify working tree is clean with no uncommitted changes

name: measure_boot_time
description: Time heady-manager.js require chain to detect boot regressions

name: scan_dead_code_exports
description: Identify exported functions with zero import references

name: verify_pipeline_stage_handlers
description: Confirm all 22 pipeline stages have registered handlers

name: check_cors_whitelist
description: Scan for wildcard CORS in all JS files

name: monitor_memory_usage
description: Check process memory usage and flag if heap > 512MB

name: refresh_embedding_index
description: Rebuild vector embeddings for recently modified files

name: run_lighthouse_audit
description: Run Lighthouse performance audit on public frontend pages

name: check_ssl_certificate_expiry
description: Check SSL certificate expiry for all Heady domains

name: sync_registry_versions
description: Ensure heady-registry.json matches deployed service versions

name: compute_operational_readiness_score
description: Calculate ORS from all health probes and pipeline metrics

name: detect_config_drift
description: Compare config file hashes against last checkpoint baseline

name: prune_stale_vector_memories
description: Remove vector embeddings older than 30 days from cold storage
